results.title: AI companies face political backlash as former White House counsel warns of failure to communicate public benefits
results.description: AI companies spent billions building products but almost nothing explaining them to the public. Now politicians in both parties are running against the technology, and some executives admit they have no dedicated communications teams.

results.title: Customers slowly handing more power to AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon - PhoneArena
results.description: Customers slowly handing more power to AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon PhoneArena

results.title: Cordless Rebar Tying Machine
results.description: Powered by 18V or 40V batteries, this portable Makita tool automatically wraps and tightens wire around rebar joints during concrete reinforcement work.
